Metadata.Author: nic x <nic@blacnova.net>
Metadata.CommitMsg:
Split CLI into per-domain modules and add TUI integration tests.

Move command dispatch out of main.rs into cli/* handlers, add keyboard and slash-command integration tests, track the dogfood handoff bundle at 100/100 Production Ready.

Co-authored-by: Cursor <cursoragent@cursor.com>

playhouseScore.methodology: Playhouse Stars (0-100) combine weighted category scores inspired by Lighthouse. Each engine normalizes to 0-100, then categories are weighted (Security 45%, Functional 25%, Performance and UX 20%, Toolchain 10%). Skipped engines are excluded and weights rebalance. 90+ Production Ready, 75+ Good, 60+ Fair, 40+ Needs Work, below 40 Critical.
why: Strong Security (Trivy): 100/100 (No high/critical vulns or secrets)

handoffChecklist.task: No Trivy secrets or HIGH/CRITICAL vulns
